What You'll Learn

Everything you need to run profitable marketing in-house.

No theory-only lectures. Every module is hands-on — you leave having built and launched real campaigns.

📘

Facebook & Instagram Ads

Set up campaigns the right way — objectives, audiences, creatives, and budgets that actually convert.

🎵

TikTok Marketing

Tap into Nigeria's fastest-growing platform — organic and paid strategies to reach a younger, buying audience.

🔍

Google Ads

Appear exactly when your customers are searching. Search, display, and YouTube ads — all covered.

💬

WhatsApp Marketing

Turn WhatsApp into a sales machine — broadcast lists, status marketing, and automated follow-up.

🌐

Website & Landing Pages

Build pages that convert your ad traffic into real customers — not just visitors who bounce.

▶️

YouTube Ads

Run video campaigns that build brand authority and drive customers — even on a small budget.

🤖

AI Tools for Marketing

Use AI to write copy, generate content, analyse data, and save hours every week — all practical.

🚀

Live Campaign Launch

You launch a real campaign before you leave. Day 5 is execution day — not more theory.

Inside The Bootcamp

Your Trainer

Learn from someone who actually does this every day.

Lead Trainer
Emmanuel O. Ikesu
Digital Marketing Strategist · SEO Expert · Google Ads Specialist

Emmanuel is a seasoned digital marketing strategist with over 10 years of hands-on experience helping more than 500 businesses across Nigeria grow their online presence and revenue. He specialises in AI, SEO, Google Ads, Google Analytics, Content Marketing and Social Media Marketing — blending strategy with execution to drive real, measurable results.

Whether you are a business owner, team leader or aspiring marketer, Emmanuel's clear teaching style, practical approach and proven expertise make him the ideal guide to help you master digital marketing and start attracting paying customers online.
